text:
new port, of NASA's VisionWorkebench, see http://ti.arc.nasa.gov/tech/asr/intelligent-robotics/nasa-vision-workbench/

This is a resubmit of PR ports/143129. I believe I have fixed all the issues there and this version is slightly updated to the final 2.0 release version.
